name: @chemag/github-action
description: Official GitHub Action for chemag — runs the chemag CLI on PRs/pushes, posts a sticky comment with violations, and emits a SARIF log for code scanning upload.
deprecated: chemag-the-framework has been wound down; the three semantic rules now ship as eslint-plugin-port-discipline. This package is preserved for history. See https://github.com/adromero/chem-agnostic#readme for the full story.
